sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro, Soft Piano, Reverb Guitars]
[Verse 1]
One path rises, the air is clear
Sunlight dancing, the way is near
The other fades in hollow night
Cold winds whisper, stealing light
[Pre-Chorus]
A voice is calling through the haze
One way leads, one way decays
The fire burns, the river flows
Which road you take, your future knows
[Chorus, Expansive, Uplifting]
I set before you life or dust
One is hope, one turns to rust
Choose the fire, choose the breath
Or fade into the hands of death
[Verse 2]
Blessings bloom where waters run
The fields rejoice beneath the sun
The sky will open, the rain will fall
If you choose to heed the call
But curse the ground, let sorrow grow
If love is left, if truth is cold
The stars will darken, winds will wail
If you turn and lose the trail
[Pre-Chorus]
A voice is calling through the haze
One way leads, one way decays
The fire burns, the river flows
Which road you take, your future knows
[Chorus, Expansive, Uplifting]
I set before you life or dust
One is hope, one turns to rust
Choose the fire, choose the breath
Or fade into the hands of death
[Bridge, Instrumental Build, Ethereal Harmonies]
[Breakdown, Stripped-Down Vocals, Soft Piano]
Stand before the parting tide
One road falls, one road climbs
[Final Chorus, Soaring and Climactic]
I set before you life or dust
One is hope, one turns to rust
Choose the fire, choose the breath
Or fade into the hands of death
[Outro, Echoing Guitar, Soft Synths]
